title: Add --all flag even though it is a noop so scripts will work
body:
Until podman build supports caching, their are no intermediary builds,
but people might still use scripts that use the --all option.
Adding this will not hurt anything and could fix scripts.

Also fixed sorting issues in options handling of images

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:
@mheon PTAL, added NOOP info to man page.
Hopefully with what @umohnani8 showed me this morning, this option will actually be useful in a couple of weeks.

LGTM, thanks for the change @rhatdan
